title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICRA Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICRA Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, ICRA Advisory Limited in Meerut is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICRA Advisory Limited:
ICRA Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICRA Advisory Limited!
